# About this item

- 【Compatible Models & Years】Exclusively designed for for Audi A4(B8)(2009-2016),S4(B8)(2009-2016),RS4(B8)(2012-2015) A5(2008-2016),S5(B8)(2008-2016),RS5(2010-2015)--With “Audi multimedia” system only - Left Driving Vehicles.
- 【Big Touch Screen Display】 12.3-inch touch screen, 1920\*720p Resolution. The IPS display delivers outstanding clarity, contrast, and brightness. Catch every single sharp, vivid, and vibrant picture from virtually any vantage point.
- 【Wireless /Wired Car Play & Android Auto】 Use your phone in safety while you drive. by simply saying “Hey Siri” or “OK Google”, to get directions, make calls, send & receive messages, and enjoy your favorite music. Get access to voice commands,Siri & Google Assistant can help you do all of these things. Note: Some smart phone maybe unable to connect wireless Android Auto.
- 【Perfect Integration】Tailor made for BMW vehicles. Not only matching the original dashboard for a perfectly integrated appearance, these units bring the most powerful Wireless CarPlay /Android Auto and touch screen experience to your BMW, making the dash smarter than ever.
- 【Original Functions Retained】Now replacing your car’s screen, and plug into the wiring harness adapter.You have a 12.3 inch touch screen to operate a smart phone link. Works with All Original Functions: MMI System, Original Audi Sound System, Original Radio, CD Player, Bluetooth, Backup Camera Display, Steering Wheel Control Function etc.
- 【1-Year Warranty】 GTRUI backs this item with a 1-year warranty and provides professional technical support. Please contact us via Amazon email, we will reply ASAP!

## Product description

![Integration of CarPlay and Audi A4 A5 B8](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/22a79c62-f11d-4e39-8dc3-a07146263c7a.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

### Key Features:

- Specially Designed for Audi Vehicles - Dual System, Perfect Integration
- 12.3" High Fidelity IPS Screen, 24:9
- 1920\*720 HD Resolution, IPS Touch Screen
- Supports Full HD 1080P Video Playback
- Supports to High Definition Rear-View with AHD Camera (Not Included)
- Built-in Bluetooth 5.0 - Hands-free Calls, BT Music, Phone Book Sync, Display Call History
- Built-in DSP EQ
- Built-in 2 USB Ports
- Built-in Wireless CarPlay \- Bluetooth Connection
- Built-in Wireless Android Auto \- Bluetooth Connection

![Voice Commands by Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/4ae41acf-d530-4868-aff5-3c28e35636d7.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

### Applicable Model & Year:

For Audi A4 (B8)(2009-2016), S4(B8)(2009-2016), RS4(B8)(2012-2015) --With “Audi multimedia” system only;

For Audi A5(2008-2016), S5(B8)(2008-2016), RS5(2010-2015) --With “Audi multimedia” system only;

Note: If you Original Audi concert / symphony (Picture blow),this unit can NOT Fit, please buy ASIN：B0DGPZ5FM7

### Original Functions Retained:

- \-\- DIY Retrofit Kit Included
- \-\- Steering Wheel Control Retained
- \-\- Amplifier System
- \-\- Original Car Information Display
- \-\- Original Radio/CD Player/Bluetooth/Backup Camera Display

![IPS touch screen CarPlay Android Auto](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/21204fe9-a406-4454-be82-95181a9a2e41.__CR0,0,970,600_PT0_SX970_V1___.jpg)

Introducing GTRUI' latest car stereos tailor made for Audi vehicles that come with its original OS. Not only matching the original dashboard for a perfectly integrated appearance, the device enables Android Auto & CarPlay & Touch Screen experience in your Audi, making the dash smarter than ever. Now without uninstalling your CD player, radio or MII control, you can swipe the screen and enter the new phone link communication and entertainment.

![Amplifier System](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/2dedc93b-1ef1-4f75-a3fc-a37fff733726.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Amplifier System

Retains original 3D Sound System.

![Steering Wheel Control](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/04e5a04e-b52a-4f70-99ff-1c4f3cf6767d.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Steering Wheel Control

Easily control your music track from your phone, answer calls, or switch sources the power is at your fingers while your eyes are on the road.

![MMI Control Retained](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/190cd222-d9df-4242-80ca-9d9c12251b72.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### MMI Control Retained

Retains the Mll control to allow ease of access to full range of functions and navigation (MMl controller is supported in original system only ).

![Backup Camera Display](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/116bbddd-12bc-4ffe-bc37-aab628ada53f.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Backup Camera Display

The OEM factory cameras, parking radar sensors, and dynamic trajectory parking lines are all supported and displayed on the large touchscreen. If you do not have the OEM camera you can add and install an aftermarket AHD 720P backup camera. When you put your car into reverse the backup camera will automatically be displayed on the screen.

![Original Bluetooth Retained](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/90c035bf-edfc-42f6-b413-258e7ebe47be.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Original Bluetooth Retained

![Original CD Player Retained](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/aplus-media-library-service-media/f337f5df-2a33-4b18-8720-275776cb63d9.__CR0,0,300,300_PT0_SX300_V1___.jpg)

#### Original CD Player Retained

Now without uninstalling your CD player. Keep the fun of CD music disks.

# Enfig RMK8-A4B67 Double Din Radio Mounting Kit for Audi A4 2002-2008

(161) [View reviews](https://enfigcarstereo.com/product/enfig-rmk8-a4b67/#reviews)

$59.99

In stock

Enfig RMK8-A4B67 Double Din Radio Mounting Kit for Audi A4 2002-2008 quantity

Add to cart

Share

- [Description](https://enfigcarstereo.com/product/enfig-rmk8-a4b67/#tab-description)
- [Additional information](https://enfigcarstereo.com/product/enfig-rmk8-a4b67/#tab-additional_information)
- [Reviews (161)](https://enfigcarstereo.com/product/enfig-rmk8-a4b67/#tab-reviews)

## Product Features

- Seamless double-din radio installation kit for most 2002-2008 Audi A4’s and 2009-2013 Seat Exeo
- Look at this page for all the unique products we have for your A4. [https://enfigcarstereo.com/radio-installation-audi-a4-s4-rs4-2002-2008-B6-B7/?make=Audi&model=A4/S4/RS4](file:///C%7C/Users/EnfigCarStereo-Chris/AppData/Local/Microsoft/Windows/INetCache/IE/BL4LIAEX/radio-installation-audi-a4-s4-rs4-2002-2008-B6-B7[1])
- Allows you to remove the radio without damaging your vehicle. Unlike most other brands.
- Painted to match the factory coat of the car.
- The mounting brackets allow exact depth adjustment for a perfect fit.

## Additional Information

- The opening on the face is 98mm x 172mm to accommodate a standard 96mm x 170mm radio nose. The nose is the part the sticks out from the rear chassis.
- The face also requires a 10mm deep nose or it will not sit flush. If you are confused send us an email with your radio make and part so we can confirm fitment. Look at this article about shallow face radios. [https://www.ceoutlook.com/2017/06/21/car-radios-undergo-shape-shift/](https://www.ceoutlook.com/2017/06/21/car-radios-undergo-shape-shift/)
- The brackets come with screws but we recommend using the screws that came with your radio.

Weight

1 lbs

Dimensions

12 × 8 × 3 in

     ## djsa4







     February 21, 2014



























     **djsa4**–February 21, 2014





     Perfect! – Before I discovered the guys here at enfig, I purchased a metra kit for my B6 a4, absolute garbage, didn’t fit. Bought this, and it fits flawlessly. Does it cost more? Yep. Is it worth it? Definitely!

002. ![](https://enfigcarstereo.com/nitropack_static/bikPcttHjXqebNsBylGofThYmHBUyfon/assets/desktop/optimized/rev-767dfcb/secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1dc61884508515d5b8bb6c0b7f2dc5fc.0b836131f784c9d603b0268095ec21a69977a1b2177f939d6d21da6f8f94f9bf)







     ## Ed G







     December 7, 2014

     ## K Brooks







     August 29, 2018



























     **K Brooks**–August 29, 2018





     Looks great, but prep first – Test fit head unit and cage with release tabs in the proper position for the Enfig dash kit PRIOR to car install. This will ensure head unit sits properly and the face place sits flush with no gaps. Some folks complained about gaps.



     The release tabs have little notches which may need to be filed down a tad. They will catch on the cage and make the head unit a bit difficult to remove – that and the space is already super tight in the B6.



     Also – use the screws that came with your head unit if the supplied screws don’t fit.



     Once everything is prepped, it fits really well.



     I will have the pull the unit again; fearful of breaking tabs on faceplate. Plan to carefully use a trim removal tool.
